revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''大塚古墳'''（おおつかこふん）は、日本の[[古墳]]の名称。 *[[駒形大塚古墳]] [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町 (栃木県)|...'

revision.text:
'''大塚古墳'''（おおつかこふん）は、日本の[[古墳]]の名称。
* [[駒形大塚古墳]] [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町 (栃木県)|那珂川町]] - [[那須小川古墳群]]に属する。国の[[史跡]]。 * [[戸祭大塚古墳]] 栃木県[[宇都宮市]] * [[方墳大塚古墳]] [[埼玉県]][[さいたま市]] * [[野毛大塚古墳]] [[東京都]][[世田谷区]] * [[鵜木大塚古墳]] 東京都[[大田区]][[雪谷大塚町]] * [[昼飯大塚古墳]] [[岐阜県]][[大垣市]] - 国の史跡。 * [[宗慶大塚古墳]] 岐阜県[[本巣市]] * [[志段味大塚古墳]] [[愛知県]][[名古屋市]][[守山区]] * [[豊田大塚古墳]] 愛知県[[豊田市]] * [[桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳|大塚古墳]] [[大阪府]][[豊中市]] * [[軽里大塚古墳]] 大阪府[[羽曳野市]] - [[宮内庁]]により[[日本武尊白鳥陵]]に指定。 * [[東田大塚古墳]] [[奈良県]][[桜井市]] - [[纒向古墳群]]に属する * [[中山大塚古墳]] 奈良県[[天理市]] * [[柳本大塚古墳]] 奈良県天理市 * [[黒田大塚古墳]] 奈良県[[磯城郡]][[田原本町]] * [[牟佐大塚古墳]] [[岡山県]][[岡山市]] - 国の史跡。 * [[箭田大塚古墳]] 岡山県[[倉敷市]] - 国の史跡。 * [[今宿大塚古墳]] [[福岡県]][[福岡市]]西区 - [[今宿古墳群]]に属する。国の史跡。 * [[田主丸大塚古墳]] 福岡県[[浮羽郡]][[田主丸町]] - [[田主丸古墳群]]に属する。国の史跡。
{{曖昧さ回避}}

'''大塚古墳'''（おおつかこふん）は、日本の[[古墳]]の名称。
* [[大塚古墳 (須賀川市)]] * [[駒形大塚古墳]] [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]] - [[那須小川古墳群]]に属する。国の[[史跡]]。 * [[戸祭大塚古墳]] 栃木県[[宇都宮市]] * [[下栗大塚古墳]] 栃木県宇都宮市 * [[大塚古墳 (川島町)]] [[埼玉県]][[比企郡]][[川島町]] * [[方墳大塚古墳]] [[埼玉県]][[さいたま市]] * [[野毛大塚古墳]] [[東京都]][[世田谷区]] * [[鵜木大塚古墳]] 東京都[[大田区]][[雪谷大塚町]] * [[宮崎大塚古墳]] [[神奈川県]][[川崎市]][[宮前区]][[宮崎 (川崎市)|宮崎]] * [[昼飯大塚古墳]] [[岐阜県]][[大垣市]] - 国の史跡。 * [[宗慶大塚古墳]] 岐阜県[[本巣市]] * [[志段味大塚古墳]] [[愛知県]][[名古屋市]][[守山区]] * [[豊田大塚古墳]] 愛知県[[豊田市]]。出土[[須恵器]]が[[重要文化財]]指定。 * [[寺戸大塚古墳]] [[京都府]][[向日市]]寺戸町芝山。国の史跡。 * [[桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳|大塚古墳]] [[大阪府]][[豊中市]] * [[軽里大塚古墳]] 大阪府[[羽曳野市]] - [[宮内庁]]により[[日本武尊白鳥陵]]に指定。 * [[東田大塚古墳]] [[奈良県]][[桜井市]] - [[纒向古墳群]]に属する * [[中山大塚古墳]] 奈良県[[天理市]] * [[柳本大塚古墳]] 奈良県天理市 * [[黒田大塚古墳]] 奈良県[[磯城郡]][[田原本町]] * [[牟佐大塚古墳]] [[岡山県]][[岡山市]] - 国の史跡。 * [[箭田大塚古墳]] 岡山県[[倉敷市]] - 国の史跡。 * [[今宿大塚古墳]] [[福岡県]][[福岡市]]西区 - [[今宿古墳群]]に属する。国の史跡。 * [[田主丸大塚古墳]] 福岡県[[浮羽郡]][[田主丸町]] - [[田主丸古墳群]]に属する。国の史跡。
== 関連項目 == * [[大塚古墳群]]
{{曖昧さ回避}}
{{デフォルトソート:おおつか こふん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]]

revision.text:
'''Ōtsuka Kofun''' (大塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} in Japan.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Sukagawa)|ja|大塚古墳 (須賀川市)}} * {{ill|Komagata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|駒形大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nakagawa, Tochigi|ja|那須郡那珂川町}}, Tochigi Prefecture, part of the {{ill|Nasu Ogawa Kofun Cluster|ja|那須小川古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|戸祭大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Utsunomiya|ja|宇都宮市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|下栗大塚古墳}} - Located in Utsunomiya, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|ja|大塚古墳 (川島町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kawajima|ja|川島町}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|方墳大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Saitama City|ja|さいたま市}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|野毛大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|鵜木大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|ja|大田区雪谷大塚町}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宮崎大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja|川崎市宮前区宮崎}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|ja|昼飯大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宗慶大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|志段味大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|名古屋市守山区}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|豊田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|ja|豊田市}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|ja|須恵器}} designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|寺戸大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|ja|桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|ja|豊中市}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|軽里大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|ja|羽曳野市}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|ja|日本武尊白鳥陵}}. * {{ill|Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|東田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|ja|纒向古墳群}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|中山大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|柳本大塚古墳}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|黒田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|ja|磯城郡田原本町}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|ja|倉敷市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja|今宿古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site.

Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|戸祭大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Utsunomiya|ja|宇都宮市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|下栗大塚古墳}} - Located in Utsunomiya, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|ja|大塚古墳 (川島町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kawajima|ja|川島町}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|方墳大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Saitama City|ja|さいたま市}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|野毛大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|鵜木大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|ja|大田区雪谷大塚町}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宮崎大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja|川崎市宮前区宮崎}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|ja|昼飯大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宗慶大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|志段味大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|名古屋市守山区}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|豊田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|ja|豊田市}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|ja|須恵器}} designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|寺戸大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|ja|桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|ja|豊中市}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|軽里大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|ja|羽曳野市}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|ja|日本武尊白鳥陵}}. * {{ill|Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|東田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|ja|纒向古墳群}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|中山大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|柳本大塚古墳}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|黒田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|ja|磯城郡田原本町}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|ja|倉敷市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja|今宿古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|ja|大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)}}

revision.text:
'''Ōtsuka Kofun''' (大塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} in Japan.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Sukagawa)|ja|大塚古墳 (須賀川市)}} * {{ill|Komagata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|駒形大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nakagawa, Tochigi|ja|那須郡那珂川町}}, Tochigi Prefecture, part of the {{ill|Nasu Ogawa Kofun Cluster|ja|那須小川古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|戸祭大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Utsunomiya|ja|宇都宮市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|下栗大塚古墳}} - Located in Utsunomiya, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|ja|大塚古墳 (川島町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kawajima|ja|川島町}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|方墳大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Saitama City|ja|さいたま市}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|野毛大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|鵜木大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|ja|大田区雪谷大塚町}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宮崎大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja|川崎市宮前区宮崎}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|ja|昼飯大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宗慶大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|志段味大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|名古屋市守山区}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|豊田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|ja|豊田市}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|ja|須恵器}} designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|寺戸大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|ja|桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|ja|豊中市}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|軽里大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|ja|羽曳野市}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|ja|日本武尊白鳥陵}}. * {{ill|Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|東田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|ja|纒向古墳群}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|中山大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|柳本大塚古墳}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|黒田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|ja|磯城郡田原本町}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|ja|倉敷市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja|今宿古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site.

Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|戸祭大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Utsunomiya|ja|宇都宮市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|下栗大塚古墳}} - Located in Utsunomiya, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|ja|大塚古墳 (川島町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kawajima|ja|川島町}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|方墳大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Saitama City|ja|さいたま市}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|野毛大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|鵜木大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|ja|大田区雪谷大塚町}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宮崎大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja|川崎市宮前区宮崎}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|ja|昼飯大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宗慶大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|志段味大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|名古屋市守山区}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|豊田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|ja|豊田市}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|ja|須恵器}} designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|寺戸大塚古墳|1=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|ja|桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|ja|豊中市}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|軽里大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|ja|羽曳野市}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|ja|日本武尊白鳥陵}}. * {{ill|Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|東田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|ja|纒向古墳群}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|中山大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|柳本大塚古墳}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|黒田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|ja|磯城郡田原本町}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|ja|倉敷市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja|今宿古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site.

'''Ōtsuka Kofun''' (大塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} in Japan.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Sukagawa)|ja|大塚古墳 (須賀川市)}} * {{ill|Komagata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|駒形大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nakagawa, Tochigi|ja|那須郡那珂川町}}, Tochigi Prefecture, part of the {{ill|Nasu Ogawa Kofun Cluster|ja|那須小川古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|戸祭大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Utsunomiya|ja|宇都宮市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|下栗大塚古墳}} - Located in Utsunomiya, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|ja|大塚古墳 (川島町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kawajima|ja|川島町}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|方墳大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Saitama City|ja|さいたま市}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|野毛大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|鵜木大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|ja|大田区雪谷大塚町}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宮崎大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja|川崎市宮前区宮崎}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|ja|昼飯大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宗慶大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|志段味大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|名古屋市守山区}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|豊田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|ja|豊田市}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|ja|須恵器}} designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|寺戸大塚古墳|1=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|ja|桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|ja|豊中市}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|軽里大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|ja|羽曳野市}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|ja|日本武尊白鳥陵}}. * {{ill|Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|東田大塚古墳|1=Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|ja|纒向古墳群}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|中山大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|柳本大塚古墳}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|黒田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|ja|磯城郡田原本町}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|ja|倉敷市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja|今宿古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site.

revision.text:
'''Ōtsuka Kofun''' (大塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} in Japan.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Sukagawa)|ja|大塚古墳 (須賀川市)}} * {{ill|Komagata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|駒形大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nakagawa, Tochigi|ja|那須郡那珂川町}}, Tochigi Prefecture, part of the {{ill|Nasu Ogawa Kofun Cluster|ja|那須小川古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|戸祭大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Utsunomiya|ja|宇都宮市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|下栗大塚古墳}} - Located in Utsunomiya, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|ja|大塚古墳 (川島町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kawajima|ja|川島町}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|方墳大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Saitama City|ja|さいたま市}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|野毛大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|鵜木大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|ja|大田区雪谷大塚町}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宮崎大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja|川崎市宮前区宮崎}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|ja|昼飯大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宗慶大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|志段味大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|名古屋市守山区}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|豊田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|ja|豊田市}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|ja|須恵器}} designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|寺戸大塚古墳|1=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|ja|桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|ja|豊中市}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|軽里大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|ja|羽曳野市}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|ja|日本武尊白鳥陵}}. * {{ill|Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|東田大塚古墳|1=Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|ja|纒向古墳群}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|中山大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|柳本大塚古墳}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|黒田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|ja|磯城郡田原本町}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|ja|倉敷市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja|今宿古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|ja|大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)}}

Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|戸祭大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Utsunomiya|ja|宇都宮市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|下栗大塚古墳}} - Located in Utsunomiya, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|ja|大塚古墳 (川島町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kawajima|ja|川島町}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|方墳大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Saitama City|ja|さいたま市}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|野毛大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|鵜木大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|ja|大田区雪谷大塚町}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宮崎大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja|川崎市宮前区宮崎}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|ja|昼飯大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宗慶大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|志段味大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|名古屋市守山区}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|豊田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|ja|豊田市}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|ja|須恵器}} designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|寺戸大塚古墳|1=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|ja|桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|ja|豊中市}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|軽里大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|ja|羽曳野市}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|ja|日本武尊白鳥陵}}. * {{ill|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|東田大塚古墳|1=Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|ja|纒向古墳群}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|中山大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|柳本大塚古墳}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|黒田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|ja|磯城郡田原本町}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|ja|倉敷市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja|今宿古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site.

Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|戸祭大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Utsunomiya|ja|宇都宮市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|下栗大塚古墳}} - Located in Utsunomiya, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|ja|大塚古墳 (川島町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kawajima|ja|川島町}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Saitama City|ja|さいたま市}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|野毛大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|鵜木大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|ja|大田区雪谷大塚町}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宮崎大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja|川崎市宮前区宮崎}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|ja|昼飯大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宗慶大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|志段味大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|名古屋市守山区}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|豊田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|ja|豊田市}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}} designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|寺戸大塚古墳|1=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|ja|桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|ja|豊中市}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|軽里大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|ja|羽曳野市}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|ja|日本武尊白鳥陵}}. * {{ill|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|東田大塚古墳|1=Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|ja|纒向古墳群}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|中山大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|柳本大塚古墳}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|黒田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|ja|磯城郡田原本町}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|ja|倉敷市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja|今宿古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site.

Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|戸祭大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Utsunomiya|ja|宇都宮市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|下栗大塚古墳}} - Located in Utsunomiya, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|ja|大塚古墳 (川島町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kawajima|ja|川島町}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Saitama City|ja|さいたま市}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|野毛大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|鵜木大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|ja|大田区雪谷大塚町}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宮崎大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja|川崎市宮前区宮崎}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|ja|昼飯大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宗慶大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|志段味大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|名古屋市守山区}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|豊田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|ja|豊田市}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}} designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|寺戸大塚古墳|1=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|ja|桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|ja|豊中市}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|軽里大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|ja|羽曳野市}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|ja|日本武尊白鳥陵}}. * {{ill|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|東田大塚古墳|1=Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|ja|纒向古墳群}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|中山大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|柳本大塚古墳}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|黒田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|ja|磯城郡田原本町}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|ja|倉敷市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja|今宿古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|ja|大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)}}

revision.text:
'''Ōtsuka Kofun''' (大塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} in Japan.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Sukagawa)|ja|大塚古墳 (須賀川市)}} * {{ill|Komagata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|駒形大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nakagawa, Tochigi|ja|那須郡那珂川町}}, Tochigi Prefecture, part of the {{ill|Nasu Ogawa Kofun Cluster|ja|那須小川古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|戸祭大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Utsunomiya|ja|宇都宮市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|下栗大塚古墳}} - Located in Utsunomiya, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|ja|大塚古墳 (川島町)}} - Located in {{ill|Kawajima|ja|川島町}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Saitama City|ja|さいたま市}}, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|野毛大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|鵜木大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|ja|大田区雪谷大塚町}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宮崎大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja|川崎市宮前区宮崎}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Hiruiōzuka Kofun|ja|昼飯大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宗慶大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Motosu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|志段味大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|名古屋市守山区}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|豊田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyota|ja|豊田市}}, Aichi Prefecture. Excavated {{ill|sue ware|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}} designated as an important cultural property. * {{ill|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|寺戸大塚古墳|1=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Terado Ōtsuka Kofun}} - Located in {{ill|Mukō|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|ja|桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|ja|豊中市}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|軽里大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|ja|羽曳野市}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|ja|ヤマトタケル|de|Yamatotakeru|fr|Yamato Takeru|ko|야마토타케루|ja|日本武尊白鳥陵}}. * {{ill|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|東田大塚古墳|1=Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun|lt=Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Makimuku Kofun Cluster|ja|纒向古墳群}}. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|中山大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tenri|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|柳本大塚古墳}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|黒田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|ja|磯城郡田原本町}}, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|牟佐大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Okayama|ja|岡山市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|箭田大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|ja|倉敷市}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja|今宿古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}. Designated a national historic site.

revision.text:
'''大塚古墳'''（おおつかこふん）は、日本の[[古墳]]の名称。
* [[大塚古墳 (須賀川市)]] * [[駒形大塚古墳]] [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]] - [[那須小川古墳群]]に属する。国の[[史跡]]。 * [[戸祭大塚古墳]] 栃木県[[宇都宮市]] * [[下栗大塚古墳]] 栃木県宇都宮市 * [[大塚古墳 (川島町)]] [[埼玉県]][[比企郡]][[川島町]] * [[方墳大塚古墳]] [[埼玉県]][[さいたま市]] * [[野毛大塚古墳]] [[東京都]][[世田谷区]] * [[鵜木大塚古墳]] 東京都[[大田区]][[雪谷大塚町]] * [[宮崎大塚古墳]] [[神奈川県]][[川崎市]][[宮前区]][[宮崎 (川崎市)|宮崎]] * [[昼飯大塚古墳]] [[岐阜県]][[大垣市]] - 国の史跡。 * [[宗慶大塚古墳]] 岐阜県[[本巣市]] * [[志段味大塚古墳]] [[愛知県]][[名古屋市]][[守山区]] * [[豊田大塚古墳]] 愛知県[[豊田市]]。出土[[須恵器]]が[[重要文化財]]指定。 * [[寺戸大塚古墳]] [[京都府]][[向日市]]寺戸町芝山。国の史跡。 * [[桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳|大塚古墳]] [[大阪府]][[豊中市]] * [[軽里大塚古墳]] 大阪府[[羽曳野市]] - [[宮内庁]]により[[日本武尊白鳥陵]]に指定。 * [[東田大塚古墳]] [[奈良県]][[桜井市]] - [[纒向古墳群]]に属する * [[中山大塚古墳]] 奈良県[[天理市]] * [[柳本大塚古墳]] 奈良県天理市 * [[黒田大塚古墳]] 奈良県[[磯城郡]][[田原本町]] * [[牟佐大塚古墳]] [[岡山県]][[岡山市]] - 国の史跡。 * [[箭田大塚古墳]] 岡山県[[倉敷市]] - 国の史跡。 * [[今宿大塚古墳]] [[福岡県]][[福岡市]]西区 - [[今宿古墳群]]に属する。国の史跡。 * [[田主丸大塚古墳]] 福岡県[[浮羽郡]][[田主丸町]] - [[田主丸古墳群]]に属する。国の史跡。
== 関連項目 == * [[大塚古墳群 (曖昧さ回避)]]
{{曖昧さ回避}}
{{デフォルトソート:おおつか こふん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[大塚古墳]] to [[Ōtsuka Kofun (disambiguation)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

'''大塚古墳'''（おおつかこふん）は、日本の[[古墳]]の名称。
* [[大塚古墳 (須賀川市)]] * [[駒形大塚古墳]] [[栃木県]][[那須郡]][[那珂川町]] - [[那須小川古墳群]]に属する。国の[[史跡]]。 * [[戸祭大塚古墳]] 栃木県[[宇都宮市]] * [[下栗大塚古墳]] 栃木県宇都宮市 * [[大塚古墳 (川島町)]] [[埼玉県]][[比企郡]][[川島町]] * [[方墳大塚古墳]] [[埼玉県]][[さいたま市]] * [[野毛大塚古墳]] [[東京都]][[世田谷区]] * [[鵜木大塚古墳]] 東京都[[大田区]][[雪谷大塚町]] * [[宮崎大塚古墳]] [[神奈川県]][[川崎市]][[宮前区]][[宮崎 (川崎市)|宮崎]] * [[昼飯大塚古墳]] [[岐阜県]][[大垣市]] - 国の史跡。 * [[宗慶大塚古墳]] 岐阜県[[本巣市]] * [[志段味大塚古墳]] [[愛知県]][[名古屋市]][[守山区]] * [[豊田大塚古墳]] 愛知県[[豊田市]]。出土[[須恵器]]が[[重要文化財]]指定。 * [[寺戸大塚古墳]] [[京都府]][[向日市]]寺戸町芝山。国の史跡。 * [[桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳|大塚古墳]] [[大阪府]][[豊中市]] * [[軽里大塚古墳]] 大阪府[[羽曳野市]] - [[宮内庁]]により[[日本武尊白鳥陵]]に指定。 * [[東田大塚古墳]] [[奈良県]][[桜井市]] - [[纒向古墳群]]に属する * [[中山大塚古墳]] 奈良県[[天理市]] * [[柳本大塚古墳]] 奈良県天理市 * [[黒田大塚古墳]] 奈良県[[磯城郡]][[田原本町]] * [[牟佐大塚古墳]] [[岡山県]][[岡山市]] - 国の史跡。 * [[箭田大塚古墳]] 岡山県[[倉敷市]] - 国の史跡。 * [[今宿大塚古墳]] [[福岡県]][[福岡市]]西区 - [[今宿古墳群]]に属する。国の史跡。 * [[田主丸大塚古墳]] 福岡県[[浮羽郡]][[田主丸町]] - [[田主丸古墳群]]に属する。国の史跡。

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大塚古墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11433994]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Ōtsuka Kofun''' (大塚古墳) refers to various [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] in Japan.
* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Sukagawa)|ja|大塚古墳 (須賀川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Sukagawa)|qq=}} * {{ill|Komagata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|駒形大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komagata Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Nakagawa, Tochigi|Nakagawa, Tochigi]], Tochigi Prefecture, part of the [[:en:Nasu Ogawa Kofun Cluster|Nasu Ogawa Kofun Cluster]]. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|戸祭大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Utsunomiya|Utsunomiya]], Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|下栗大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Utsunomiya, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|ja|大塚古墳 (川島町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kawajima, Saitama|Kawajima]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|方墳|1=square kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun大塚古墳|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504353}} - Located in [[:en:Saitama (city)|Saitama City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|野毛大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]], Tokyo. * {{ill|Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|鵜木大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|ja|大田区雪谷大塚町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宮崎大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja|川崎市宮前区宮崎|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * [[:en:Hiruiōzuka Kofun|Hiruiōzuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Ōgaki|Ōgaki]], Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宗慶大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Motosu, Gifu|Motosu]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|志段味大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|名古屋市守山区|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|豊田大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Toyota, Aichi|Toyota]], Aichi Prefecture. Excavated [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] designated as an important cultural property. * [[:en:Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Mukō|Mukō]], Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|ja|桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Toyonaka|Toyonaka]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|軽里大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Habikino|Habikino]], Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] as the tomb of [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru no Mikoto]]. * [[:en:Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Sakurai, Nara|Sakurai, Nara]], Nara Prefecture. Part of the [[:en:Makimuku Kofun Cluster|Makimuku Kofun Cluster]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|中山大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Tenri, Nara|Tenri]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|柳本大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|黒田大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|ja|磯城郡田原本町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tawaramoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Nara Prefecture. * [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Kurashiki|Kurashiki]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja|今宿古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Kofun Cluster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Designated a national historic site.

Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|戸祭大塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Utsunomiya|Utsunomiya]], Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|下栗大塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Utsunomiya, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|ja|大塚古墳 (川島町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kawajima, Saitama|Kawajima]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|方墳|1=square kofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun大塚古墳|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504353}} - Located in [[:en:Saitama (city)|Saitama City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|野毛大塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]], Tokyo. * {{ill|Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|鵜木大塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|ja|大田区雪谷大塚町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宮崎大塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja|川崎市宮前区宮崎|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * [[:en:Hiruiōzuka Kofun|Hiruiōzuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Ōgaki|Ōgaki]], Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宗慶大塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Motosu, Gifu|Motosu]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|志段味大塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|名古屋市守山区|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|豊田大塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Toyota, Aichi|Toyota]], Aichi Prefecture. Excavated [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] designated as an important cultural property. * [[:en:Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Mukō|Mukō]], Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|ja|桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Toyonaka|Toyonaka]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|軽里大塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Habikino|Habikino]], Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] as the tomb of [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru no Mikoto]]. * [[:en:Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Sakurai, Nara|Sakurai, Nara]], Nara Prefecture. Part of the [[:en:Makimuku Kofun Cluster|Makimuku Kofun Cluster]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|中山大塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Tenri, Nara|Tenri]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|柳本大塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|黒田大塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|ja|磯城郡田原本町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tawaramoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Nara Prefecture. * [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Kurashiki|Kurashiki]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja|今宿古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Designated a national historic site.

Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Designated a national historic site.

* {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Sukagawa)|ja|大塚古墳 (須賀川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Sukagawa)|qq=}} * {{ill|Komagata Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|駒形大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komagata Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Nakagawa, Tochigi|Nakagawa, Tochigi]], Tochigi Prefecture, part of the [[:en:Nasu Ogawa Kofun Cluster|Nasu Ogawa Kofun Cluster]]. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|戸祭大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Utsunomiya|Utsunomiya]], Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|下栗大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Utsunomiya, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|ja|大塚古墳 (川島町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kawajima, Saitama|Kawajima]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|方墳|1=square kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun大塚古墳|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504353}} - Located in [[:en:Saitama (city)|Saitama City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|野毛大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]], Tokyo. * {{ill|Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|鵜木大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|ja|大田区雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宮崎大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja|川崎市宮前区宮崎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * [[:en:Hiruiōzuka Kofun|Hiruiōzuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Ōgaki|Ōgaki]], Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宗慶大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Motosu, Gifu|Motosu]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|志段味大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|名古屋市守山区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|豊田大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Toyota, Aichi|Toyota]], Aichi Prefecture. Excavated [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] designated as an important cultural property. * [[:en:Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Mukō|Mukō]], Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|ja|桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Toyonaka|Toyonaka]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|軽里大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Habikino|Habikino]], Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] as the tomb of [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru no Mikoto]]. * [[:en:Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Sakurai, Nara|Sakurai, Nara]], Nara Prefecture. Part of the [[:en:Makimuku Kofun Cluster|Makimuku Kofun Cluster]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|中山大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Tenri, Nara|Tenri]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|柳本大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|黒田大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|ja|磯城郡田原本町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tawaramoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Nara Prefecture. * [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Kurashiki|Kurashiki]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja|今宿古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Kurashiki|Kurashiki]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|戸祭大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Utsunomiya|Utsunomiya]], Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|下栗大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimoguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Utsunomiya, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|ja|大塚古墳 (川島町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Kawajima)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kawajima, Saitama|Kawajima]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|方墳|1=square kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfun Ōtsuka Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun大塚古墳|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504353}} - Located in [[:en:Saitama (city)|Saitama City]], Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|野毛大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noge Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]], Tokyo. * {{ill|Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|鵜木大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unoki Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ōta, Tokyo|ja|大田区雪谷大塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Tokyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宮崎大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki Ōtsuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja|川崎市宮前区宮崎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamae-ku, Kawasaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Kanagawa Prefecture. * [[:en:Hiruiōzuka Kofun|Hiruiōzuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Ōgaki|Ōgaki]], Gifu Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|宗慶大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Motosu, Gifu|Motosu]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|志段味大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shidami Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja|名古屋市守山区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|豊田大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyota Ōtsuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Toyota, Aichi|Toyota]], Aichi Prefecture. Excavated [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] designated as an important cultural property. * [[:en:Terado Ōtsuka Kofun|Terado Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Mukō|Mukō]], Kyoto Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|ja|桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Toyonaka|Toyonaka]], Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|軽里大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Habikino|Habikino]], Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] as the tomb of [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru no Mikoto]]. * [[:en:Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Sakurai, Nara|Sakurai, Nara]], Nara Prefecture. Part of the [[:en:Makimuku Kofun Cluster|Makimuku Kofun Cluster]]. * {{ill|Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|中山大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayama Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Tenri, Nara|Tenri]], Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|柳本大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagimoto Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in Tenri, Nara Prefecture. * {{ill|Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|黒田大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tawaramoto|ja|磯城郡田原本町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tawaramoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Nara Prefecture. * [[:en:Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Okayama|Okayama]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * [[:en:Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun]] - Located in [[:en:Kurashiki|Kurashiki]], Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja|今宿古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Designated a national historic site.

Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Sakurazuka Tomb Group (Toyonaka City)|lt=Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|ja|桜塚古墳群 (豊中市)#大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun (Toyonaka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyonaka|en|Toyonaka|WD=Q467479|lt=Toyonaka}}, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|軽里大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kariguri Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Habikino|en|Habikino|WD=Q694308|lt=Habikino}}, Osaka Prefecture. Officially designated by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|Imperial Household Agency|WD=Q1143602|lt=Imperial Household Agency}} as the tomb of {{ill|Yamato Takeru|en|Yamato Takeru|WD=Q461258|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto}}. * {{ill|Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|en|Higashida Ōtsuka Kofun|WD=Q11528075|lt=Higaida Ōtsuka Kofun}} - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|Sakurai, Nara|WD=Q127026|lt=Sakurai, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|en|Yata Ōtsuka Kofun|WD=Q11603302|lt=Yata Ōtsuka Kofun}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki|en|Kurashiki|WD=Q467487|lt=Kurashiki}}, Okayama Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|今宿大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja|福岡市西区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|ja|田主丸大塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja|浮羽郡田主丸町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Fukuoka Prefecture.
